title: Exam Tactics and Next Steps
description: How to read scenario questions, eliminate wrong answers, manage time, and put together a study plan for the weeks before the exam.

lessons.title: Reading Scenarios and Eliminating Answers
objectives: Spot the priority word that points to the best answer
Eliminate anti-patterns and options that break a hard constraint
Manage time with flag-and-return, and never leave a blank

lessons.title: A Study Plan and Resources
objectives: Sequence your prep from fundamentals to timed practice exams
Prioritise the heaviest domains and the 'which service?' comparisons
Decide when your practice scores mean you're ready to book
